mapper.select: select lead_id, user_id, product_id, product_name, category_id, name, phone, region_id, status, assigned_to, follow_note, create_time, update_time from bh_lead where lead_id = #{leadId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.update:
update bh_lead
status = #{request.status},
assigned_to = #{request.assignedTo},
follow_note = #{request.followNote},
update_time = now()
where lead_id = #{leadId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into bh_lead (user_id, product_id, product_name, name, phone, region_id, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{regionId}, #{status}, '0', now(), now())
